instruction_quality.evidence: Project-specific paths, conventions, safe-to-run/security section; build/test/lint present but templated TODO placeholders.
instruction_quality.why: Value comes from project-specific facts (exact commands, paths, gotchas), not boilerplate.
instruction_quality.consequence: Placeholder commands force trial-and-error until real ones are wired.

hierarchical_instructions.evidence: No subpackages yet; single root AGENTS.md is appropriate for current scale.
hierarchical_instructions.why: Scoped per-package files give locally-relevant context in large repos.
hierarchical_instructions.consequence: N/A until the project grows multiple packages.

cross_agent_bridge.evidence: CLAUDE.md is a symlink to AGENTS.md (single source of truth, no drift).

repo_map_availability.evidence: No source yet (repo_map.py: 0 files); a map is cleanly generatable once code lands.
repo_map_availability.why: Repo maps cut navigation token cost ~70%.
repo_map_availability.consequence: Once code exists without a map, agents fall back to broad reads.

semantic_nav_amenability.evidence: Swift is LSP-amenable (sourcekit-lsp) but no code/config present yet.
semantic_nav_amenability.why: Typed, analyzable code is the precondition for semantic nav (Serena/LSP).
semantic_nav_amenability.consequence: Until code with types exists, semantic tooling has nothing to index.
semantic_nav_amenability.fix_ref: Write typed Swift; ensure sourcekit-lsp available.

dependency_structure_clarity.evidence: No manifest yet (no Package.swift/.xcodeproj); only a suggested layout documented.
dependency_structure_clarity.why: A derivable dependency graph lets agents reason about blast radius.
dependency_structure_clarity.consequence: No manifest means no module boundaries to reason about.
dependency_structure_clarity.fix_ref: Add Package.swift / Xcode project with clear modules.

readme_overview.evidence: README has purpose, goals, requirements, setup (TODO), contributing, structure pointers.
readme_overview.why: A root overview orients agents before deep work.
readme_overview.consequence: Setup is still TODO pending toolchain choice.

machine_readable_contracts.evidence: Not applicable: desktop GUI window-switcher has no API/service boundaries.

file_size_sanity.evidence: 0 oversized files; total 350 LOC across docs (file_metrics.py).

test_suite_present.why: Tests are the highest-impact comprehension signal for agents.
test_suite_present.consequence: Agents cannot verify changes; regressions go undetected.
test_suite_present.fix_ref: Write tests in Tests/ once code exists.

test_commands_documented.evidence: AGENTS.md documents `swift test` as a TODO placeholder; no runner detected (test_commands.py).
test_commands_documented.why: Tests only help if the agent can find and run them.

fast_feedback_loop.why: A fast subset enables seconds-long iteration.

feedback_quality.evidence: No tests or type-checker config (Swift is statically typed once code exists).
feedback_quality.why: Descriptive failures + type-checking yield actionable signals.

coverage_reasonable.evidence: No coverage config or test breadth.

ci_runs_tests_lint.evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml present with build/test/lint stages, currently echo-TODO placeholders.
ci_runs_tests_lint.why: CI is the mandatory feedback gate for agent-authored changes.
ci_runs_tests_lint.consequence: Stages don't execute real commands yet.

lint_format_automated.evidence: swiftlint/swift-format referenced in pre-commit + CI, but no linter config file (.swiftlint.yml) committed.
lint_format_automated.why: A runnable linter config enforces conventions mechanically.

pre_commit_hooks.evidence: .pre-commit-config.yaml with detect-secrets, file hygiene hooks, and swiftlint/swift-format local hooks.

governance.why: CODEOWNERS routes review; dependency automation keeps the surface fresh.
governance.consequence: Agent PRs lack reviewers; deps will rot.

standard_skills.why: Standard Skills package reusable, portable capabilities.

bundled_helper_scripts.evidence: No bundled scripts/ in a Skill.
bundled_helper_scripts.why: Scripts keep deterministic logic out of context.

mcp_declaration.evidence: No committed .mcp.json or vendor MCP config in the project.
mcp_declaration.why: A committed MCP config makes tool access reproducible.

nav_comprehension_mcp_servers.evidence: No Serena/Sourcegraph/Context7 wired in the project.
nav_comprehension_mcp_servers.consequence: Agents rely on fuzzy text search.
nav_comprehension_mcp_servers.fix_ref: Register Serena et al. in MCP config.

custom_commands.why: Committed commands capture repeatable per-agent workflows (Skills preferred).

committed_isolation_config.why: True isolation is the only reliable boundary for autonomous execution.
committed_isolation_config.consequence: Compromised code can reach network/secrets freely.

documented_execution_policy.evidence: docs/agent-execution.md names LINCE/devcontainer/OS-sandbox/hosted + safe-to-run and ask-first lists.

agent_permission_policy.why: A restrictive policy constrains unprompted agent actions.
agent_permission_policy.consequence: Agents may run arbitrary commands unprompted.
agent_permission_policy.fix_ref: Author deny rules per threat model.

secret_hygiene.evidence: .gitignore covers secrets 100% + .env.example (no values) + detect-secrets hook; CI secret scanning/push protection not yet enabled (secret_hygiene.py).
secret_hygiene.why: AI commits leak secrets at ~2x baseline; defense in layers prevents leaks.
secret_hygiene.consequence: Without host-side scanning, a leak can reach the remote.

supply_chain_pinning.why: Committed lockfiles + auto-updates pin the dependency surface.
supply_chain_pinning.consequence: Once deps land, unpinned builds drift.

injection_hygiene.evidence: Instructions live only in trusted files; no injected/executable content in docs.

spec_tasks_dir.evidence: specs/ with TEMPLATE.md (template present; no populated specs yet).
spec_tasks_dir.why: A specs dir gives agents an authoritative statement of what to build.
spec_tasks_dir.consequence: No real specs to steer work yet.

acceptance_criteria.evidence: specs/TEMPLATE.md includes an acceptance-criteria section; no populated specs yet.
acceptance_criteria.why: Acceptance criteria give a verifiable definition of done.
acceptance_criteria.consequence: Done is subjective until specs are written.

issue_pr_templates.why: Templates standardize context per unit of work.

adr_decisions.why: ADRs preserve the why behind design choices.

docs_comprehension_signals.evidence: docs/ present (agent-execution.md); no ARCHITECTURE.md, no changelog, no code yet for type/docstring signals.
docs_comprehension_signals.why: Architecture doc + type/docstring coverage aid comprehension.
docs_comprehension_signals.consequence: No structural overview or changelog yet.

instruction_audit.note: AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md duplication is a symlink bridge, not a copy

top_improvements.description: Add a test suite + document/wire real test commands once code exists.
Declare an MCP config (Serena for Swift nav) and add a project Skill.
Add CODEOWNERS + Dependabot, wire real CI commands and a swiftlint config.
Add Package.swift/Xcode project for clear modules + dependency graph.
Add issue/PR templates, an ADR dir, and an ARCHITECTURE.md.
